description: A plain candid operational photograph (no graphic design or on-image text overlay) showing an ICE arrest in progress. On the left, an armed ICE officer wears tactical gear including a green/tan plate carrier marked 'POLICE' with patches, a baseball cap, a tan neck gaiter/balaclava covering the lower face, brown pants and a black tactical glove. He is escorting, on the right, a handcuffed man with dark hair wearing a light gray hoodie and red-and-black buffalo-plaid pajama-style pants, hands restrained behind his back. The setting is a residential street with a double yellow center line, brick apartment buildings, parked vehicles (including a black SUV and what appears to be a Dodge Durango) and trees in the background under overcast early-morning light. The detainee's face is partially blurred. The image documents the arrest described in the tweet (Ander Cortez-Mendez, described as a Guatemalan sex offender). It is a routine enforcement photo rather than a designed meme/poster. The detected OCR text is image-encoding noise, not real on-image text.
